category_sources: Official TagLib homepage says it reads and edits metadata for popular audio formats.
source_facts.description says TagLib is an audio metadata library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is TagLib and subtitle is TagLib Audio Meta-Data Library.
source_facts.name is taglib, normalized to official display capitalization TagLib.
docs_sources: Official TagLib homepage links to online API documentation at https://taglib.org/api/.
source_facts.homepage is the official TagLib site.
repo_sources: Official TagLib homepage says TagLib is hosted on GitHub and links to the development source at https://github.com/taglib/taglib.
tags_sources: Official TagLib homepage describes the library as C++ with C bindings.
Official TagLib homepage lists metadata containers such as ID3v1, ID3v2, and Vorbis comments and formats including MP3, Ogg, Opus, and FLAC.
source_facts.description identifies an audio metadata library.
